heroDesc: Redefining the possibilities of creative realization with Web3 × Gamification × AI.
vision: Transforming creativity into reality. Crealize is a name composed of "Creative" × "Realize".
"Creativity without implementation is just talk." We excel at executing ideas from 0 to 1, through validation and refinement, ultimately becoming tangible digital products.
By combining Web3, gamification, AI, and value networks, we provide creators with unprecedented tools and opportunities.
projects: Art Trading Platform - Smart contracts and third-party KYC ensure trust, likes and follows determine market prices, transparent evaluation system open to community participation.
Idol & Creator Stock Trading Platform - Voting is support, affecting "market value", trading activities return fees to idols, currently under compliance review in Singapore.
MARS2049: Mars Colonization × GameFi - Build-to-Earn mechanism × blockchain assets, Telegram Mini App in global closed beta, future support for NFT and multi-chain interoperability.
AI Virtual Influencer - Integrated with x.com API, capturing trending news, auto-generating comment suggestions, can serve as corporate spokespersons or community managers.
tech: Decentralized × Frontend-driven - Low maintenance, high stability, scalable design philosophy.
Static frontend deployment achieves zero servers, zero maintenance costs, blockchain integration enables decentralized identity verification and asset management.
AI multi-language translation system: Using Google Apps Script with GPT, low-cost, high-freedom development model.
join: Global recruitment, supporting full remote work, headquarters in Tokyo.
Completely free work environment, focusing on results, no clock-in requirements.
We need engineers, designers, PMs, creatives, game producers, legal professionals, Web3 specialists.
contact: Crealize LLC established on October 9, 2024, Founder: Yves CHEN.
Address: 1-2-9-3 Higashi, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo, Shibuya Bridge B-5 (provided by Shibuya Startup Support).
Work locations: Tokyo + global remote teams (Taiwan, Singapore, Dubai, London).
